items.title: Goldman Sachs says government shutdown could hit economy harder than ever
items.description: Goldman said the dent to economic activity could far exceed past shutdowns, as it forecasted an end to the impasse later this month

items.title: Boyd Announces Sale of its Thermal Business to Eaton for $9.5 Billion
items.description: BOCA RATON, Fla., November 03, 2025--Boyd Corporation ("Boyd"), the trusted global innovator in engineered materials and thermal solutions, today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to sell its Thermal business to Eaton, an intelligent power management company, for $9.5 billion. The transaction is subject to customary closing conditions, including the receipt of required regulatory approvals, and is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026.

items.title: Bank of England braced for tough call on interest rates
items.description: The Bank of England is set for a knife-edge decision on whether to cut interest rates on Thursday.

items.title: Why the Goldman Sachs CEO isn’t buying the AI jobs freakout
items.description: The fingerprints of artificial intelligence are all over mass layoffs and downsizing at Meta, Amazon, Salesforce, YouTube and other major companies, raising fears of an AI-fueled jobs wipeout for white-collar workers.
